title: Gnarled Hammer
description: Upon pickup, [gold]Enchant[/gold] up to [blue]3[/blue] Attacks with [purple]Sharp[/purple] [blue]+3[/blue].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Upon obtaining this relic, you must manually select up to 3 Attack cards from your deck to enchant with Sharp (grants +3 attack). The selection cannot be cancelled and requires manual confirmation.
